params.name: Leeku's Guitar
params.description: Despite not being able to return to the music scene for a while, Leeku's love for music has always been undying, and she could play all kinds of musical instruments. This guitar is her favorite; it has been with it since her debut. Its strings have been replaced many times, but the tune remained ever-so-precise.
